name: AANA Pilot Evaluation Kit
description: Synthetic and public-data-rehearsal pilot scenarios for evaluating AANA adapter routing before real-world deployment.

public_data_options.name: MultiWOZ-style task dialogue
public_data_options.use: Convert task-oriented dialogues into missing-fact, wrong-recipient, wrong-booking, and policy-boundary scenarios.

public_data_options.name: Enron-style workplace email corpus
public_data_options.use: Create recipient, attachment, sensitive-content, and attribution stress cases after redaction review.

public_data_options.name: LegalBench-style legal reasoning tasks
public_data_options.use: Create source-boundary, jurisdiction, unsupported-advice, and human-review routing fixtures.

public_data_options.name: PubMedQA/MedQA-style medical QA
public_data_options.use: Create emergency-routing, unsupported medical-claim, and evidence-boundary scenarios.

public_data_options.name: Data.gov/Open Contracting procurement records
public_data_options.use: Create vendor-identity, pricing, eligibility, deadline, and required-document checks.

public_data_options.name: Public records request and FOIA-style release logs
public_data_options.use: Create privacy redaction, export scope, retention, source-boundary, and public-release review scenarios.

packs.title: Enterprise Shadow Pilot
packs.goal: Evaluate customer, employee, engineering, and release workflows that need private facts, approval routing, or rollback readiness.

pilot_surface.entrypoint: HTTP bridge or agent middleware before customer-visible messages, internal ticket updates, access changes, code changes, exports, and releases.
pilot_surface.operating_mode: shadow first, advisory after route calibration, direct action only for low-risk accept paths with complete evidence.
pilot_surface.review_handoff: Route revise/defer/refuse outcomes to the owning queue with redacted audit metrics and source-freshness notes.

scenarios.operator_workflow: Support agent sees revised reply and verifies order/refund facts before sending.
User must confirm recipient, intent, attachments, and irreversible send before delivery.
Support or engineering owner verifies status claims, commitments, and customer-visible wording before updating the ticket.
Data steward confirms scope, destination, authorization, private data handling, and retention policy before export.
IAM reviewer checks least privilege, authority, approval, and expiration.
Engineering reviewer checks diff scope, test evidence, secrets, destructive commands, and migration risk before merge.
Release owner resolves rollback, migration, health-check, and observability gaps before launch.
Incident commander validates severity, customer impact, mitigation status, ETA, and comms approval before posting.

packs.title: Personal Productivity Pilot
packs.goal: Evaluate local assistant guardrails for private files, email, calendar, research, and purchases.

pilot_surface.entrypoint: Local desktop, browser extension, or personal assistant middleware before sending, scheduling, editing files, purchasing, or publishing research answers.
pilot_surface.operating_mode: advisory by default; user confirmation remains mandatory for irreversible send, schedule, purchase, export, write, move, and delete actions.
pilot_surface.review_handoff: Return a concise user-facing revise/ask/defer explanation and require explicit approval before external side effects.

scenarios.operator_workflow: User checks recipient, intent, sensitive content, attachments, and irreversible send approval before sending.
User reviews path scope, diff/preview, backup status, and confirmation before write/delete.
User confirms timezone, attendees, availability, and consent before invites are sent.
User approves price, vendor, refundability, and irreversible payment before purchase.
Writer revises unsupported claims and preserves uncertainty before publishing or sharing.

packs.title: Civic and Government Pilot
packs.goal: Evaluate public-service workflows where eligibility, procurement, deadlines, policy boundaries, and review routing matter.

pilot_surface.entrypoint: Case-management or document-review middleware before public replies, procurement notes, grant decisions, public-record releases, policy memos, and benefits triage.
pilot_surface.operating_mode: shadow only until agency policy, records retention, accessibility, and human-review obligations are approved.
pilot_surface.review_handoff: Route any eligibility, legal, privacy, protected-class, or public-facing claim risk to a human reviewer with cited evidence boundaries.

scenarios.operator_workflow: Records officer verifies export scope, private-data redaction, destination, authorization, and retention policy before release.
Policy analyst revises unsupported claims, preserves source boundaries, and labels uncertainty before circulation.
Benefits triage reviewer avoids final eligibility promises, identifies missing documents, and escalates jurisdiction or policy gaps.
Reviewer checks eligibility, deadlines, required documents, and scoring claims.
Procurement reviewer checks vendor identity, data sharing, contract terms, and security review.
Assistant routes legal-adjacent answers to general information, ask, defer, or human review.
Publisher fixes claims, citations, private info, and brand/legal risk before posting.

packs.title: Public Data Rehearsal
packs.goal: Use public-data-shaped cases to prepare for real pilots while avoiding private customer or employee data.

pilot_surface.entrypoint: Offline fixture generation and shadow evaluation pipeline before any private-data connector is enabled.
pilot_surface.operating_mode: evaluation only; public datasets seed non-private stress cases after license and redaction review.
pilot_surface.review_handoff: Use failed expectations to decide which adapters need stronger fixtures, dedicated adapters, or real connector work.

scenarios.operator_workflow: Evaluator confirms source-boundary behavior and unsupported-claim repair.
Evaluator confirms missing private facts route to secure verification.
Evaluator checks benchmark claims, regressions, safety evals, and release scope.
